title: mxGraphStyle
description: JSON Schema validating common mxGraph and draw.io style string properties.

rounded.description: Toggles rounded corners for shapes and lines.

arcSize.description: The radius or percentage sizing of the rounded corner.

rotation.description: The angle of rotation in degrees clockwise.

aspect.description: Locks aspect ratio during manual resizing if set to fixed.

fillColor.description: The primary background color of the shape (Hex, html color, or 'none').

strokeColor.description: The border color of the shape or the line color of an edge.

gradientColor.description: The destination color for a background gradient.

gradientDirection.description: The direction towards which the gradientColor blends.

opacity.description: Alpha transparency of the entire cell (0-100).

fillOpacity.description: Alpha transparency of only the shape fill (0-100).

strokeOpacity.description: Alpha transparency of only the shape border/edge line (0-100).

strokeWidth.description: Thickness of the border or edge line in pixels.

dashPattern.description: Custom dash sequence of space-separated numbers (e.g., '5 5').

shadow.description: Toggles a generic drop shadow behind the cell.

fontColor.description: Hex or text color of the label.

fontStyle.description: Style flags bitmask. 0=Normal, 1=Bold, 2=Italic, 4=Underline. Add values together to combine styles.

align.description: Horizontal text alignment relative to the cell boundary.

verticalAlign.description: Vertical text alignment relative to the cell boundary.

labelBackgroundColor.description: Background color for the text bounding box.

labelBorderColor.description: Border color for the text bounding box.

whiteSpace.description: Forces text to wrap automatically based on cell width if set to 'wrap'.

edgeStyle.description: The routing algorithm used for edges.

elbow.description: Direction of the bend if edgeStyle is elbowEdgeStyle.

curved.description: Smooths out structural bends into Bezier curves.

orthogonalLoop.description: Whether an orthogonal route should try to avoid looping through the cell it's connected to.

jettySize.description: The length of the straight line segment (jetty) coming out of a port before the router is allowed to bend.

html.description: Toggles whether text labels should be rendered using basic HTML tags.

exitX.description: The relative X coordinate where an edge leaves the source node boundary (0.0 to 1.0).

exitY.description: The relative Y coordinate where an edge leaves the source node boundary (0.0 to 1.0).

exitDx.description: Absolute pixel offset in the X axis for the edge departure point.

exitDy.description: Absolute pixel offset in the Y axis for the edge departure point.

entryX.description: The relative X coordinate where an edge enters the target node boundary (0.0 to 1.0).

entryY.description: The relative Y coordinate where an edge enters the target node boundary (0.0 to 1.0).

entryDx.description: Absolute pixel offset in the X axis for the edge entry point.

entryDy.description: Absolute pixel offset in the Y axis for the edge entry point.

startArrow.description: Marker shape at the start of the line.

endArrow.description: Marker shape at the end of the line.

startSize.description: Scale size of the start arrow marker.

endSize.description: Scale size of the end arrow marker.

perimeter.description: Defines how lines visually connect to the boundary of the node.

portConstraint.description: Restricts edge attachments to specific sides of a node.

swimlaneLine.description: Draws a line dividing the header from the body in a swimlane shape.
